title: What Self-Control Actually Means for a Man of God
caption:
You've tried gritting your teeth through it. It works for about four days.

Self-control was never a muscle you flex alone. It's a fruit the Spirit grows in you as you stay close to Him.

The fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, and self-control. (Galatians 5:22-23)

Here's what actually builds it.

#faith #christianmen #selfcontrol #discipline #manofgod #godlymen
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
